flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Principia College fell 23% between 2021 and 2024 (70.5% → 54.5%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Principia College fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (85.9% → 74.3%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Principia College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($30.8k → $34.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Principia College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($30.8k → $34.7k).
